ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter a vault path ending in .js.
ast.target: 请输入以 .js 结尾的保险库路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable support for the safe-js-debug code block language.
ast.target: 启用对 safe-js-debug 代码块语言的支持。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Cancel scripts that run longer than the configured timeout.
ast.target: 取消运行时间超过配置超时时间的脚本。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Configure vault .js files as commands.
ast.target: 将保险库中的 .js 文件配置为命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read file names, folder names, file metadata, and file contents from this vault.
ast.target: 从此保险库中读取文件名、文件夹名、文件元数据和文件内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read Obsidian metadata such as links, tags, headings, blocks, aliases, and frontmatter.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 元数据，如链接、标签、标题、块、别名和前置信息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create new files, folders, or copies in the vault without overwriting existing paths.
ast.target: 在保险库中创建新文件、文件夹或副本，而不覆盖现有路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Change existing file contents in the vault, including appending text or binary data.
ast.target: 更改保险库中的现有文件内容，包括追加文本或二进制数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move files and folders. Some methods may also update links in other notes.
ast.target: 重命名或移动文件和文件夹。某些方法也可能更新其他笔记中的链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Move files and folders to trash using Obsidian deletion settings.
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 删除设置将文件和文件夹移至回收站。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read active file identity, recent files, leaves, layout, and active editor state.
ast.target: 读取活动文件标识、最近文件、窗格、布局和活动编辑器状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open existing files or views and change active panes without editing vault content.
ast.target: 打开现有文件或视图，并在不编辑保险库内容的情况下更改活动窗格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read unsaved text, selections, cursor positions, scroll state, and active editor content.
ast.target: 读取未保存的文本、选区、光标位置、滚动状态和活动编辑器内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Modify unsaved editor text, selections, cursor position, focus, history, or scroll state.
ast.target: 修改未保存的编辑器文本、选区、光标位置、焦点、历史记录或滚动状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display short notices inside Obsidian.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 内显示简短通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Send script-provided data to HTTP or HTTPS services and read their responses.
ast.target: 将脚本提供的数据发送到 HTTP 或 HTTPS 服务并读取其响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render script results as Markdown or sanitized HTML in Obsidian.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中将脚本结果渲染为 Markdown 或经过清理的 HTML。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read this script source's own Safe JS storage keys, not arbitrary vault or Obsidian storage.
ast.target: 读取此脚本源自身的 Safe JS 存储键，而非任意保险库或 Obsidian 存储。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write this script source's own Safe JS storage keys.
ast.target: 写入此脚本源自身的 Safe JS 存储键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read Safe JS storage keys shared across approved scripts on this device.
ast.target: 读取此设备上已批准脚本共享的 Safe JS 存储键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write Safe JS storage keys shared across approved scripts on this device.
ast.target: 写入此设备上已批准脚本共享的 Safe JS 存储键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run pure Obsidian helper functions for paths, links, search, and YAML.
ast.target: 运行用于路径、链接、搜索和 YAML 的纯 Obsidian 辅助函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline custom validator.
ast.target: 内联自定义验证器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the current vault name.
ast.target: 读取当前保险库名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read whether Obsidian is currently using dark mode.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 当前是否使用深色模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether this Obsidian version satisfies a required API version.
ast.target: 检查此 Obsidian 版本是否满足所需的 API 版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the current Obsidian language code.
ast.target: 读取当前 Obsidian 语言代码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Normalize path separators and duplicate path segments using Obsidian path rules.
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 路径规则规范化路径分隔符和重复路径段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parse wikilink text into path and subpath parts.
ast.target: 将维基链接文本解析为路径和子路径部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run Obsidian simple search matching for a query and text.
ast.target: 对查询和文本运行 Obsidian 简单搜索匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run Obsidian fuzzy search matching for a query and text.
ast.target: 对查询和文本运行 Obsidian 模糊搜索匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parse YAML text using Obsidian YAML parsing.
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian YAML 解析解析 YAML 文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stringify a JSON-safe value using Obsidian YAML formatting.
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian YAML 格式将 JSON 安全值字符串化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the folder Obsidian would use for a new file.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 将用于新文件的文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate a Markdown link using Obsidian link preferences.
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 链接首选项生成 Markdown 链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make an HTTP or HTTPS request and return status, headers, text, and JSON response data.
ast.target: 发出 HTTP 或 HTTPS 请求并返回状态、标头、文本和 JSON 响应数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a Safe JS storage value scoped to this script source.
ast.target: 读取限定于此脚本源的 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List Safe JS storage keys scoped to this script source.
ast.target: 列出限定于此脚本源的 Safe JS 存储键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write a Safe JS storage value scoped to this script source.
ast.target: 写入限定于此脚本源的 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete a Safe JS storage value scoped to this script source.
ast.target: 删除限定于此脚本源的 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete all Safe JS storage values scoped to this script source.
ast.target: 删除限定于此脚本源的所有 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a Safe JS storage value shared across scripts on this device.
ast.target: 读取此设备上脚本共享的 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List Safe JS storage keys shared across scripts on this device.
ast.target: 列出此设备上脚本共享的 Safe JS 存储键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Write a Safe JS storage value shared across scripts on this device.
ast.target: 写入此设备上脚本共享的 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete a Safe JS storage value shared across scripts on this device.
ast.target: 删除此设备上脚本共享的 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete all Safe JS storage values shared across scripts on this device.
ast.target: 删除此设备上脚本共享的所有 Safe JS 存储值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a short Obsidian notice.
ast.target: 显示一条简短的 Obsidian 通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read Obsidian metadata cache for a vault file.
ast.target: 读取保险库文件的 Obsidian 元数据缓存。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolve a wiki-style link path from a source note.
ast.target: 从源笔记解析维基风格的链接路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate link text for a file from a source note.
ast.target: 从源笔记生成文件的链接文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read Obsidian resolved link counts.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 已解析的链接计数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read Obsidian unresolved link counts.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 未解析的链接计数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read all tags from a note metadata cache.
ast.target: 从笔记元数据缓存中读取所有标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolve a heading, block, or footnote subpath inside a note.
ast.target: 解析笔记内的标题、块或脚注子路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Parse frontmatter location and raw text from note content.
ast.target: 从笔记内容中解析前置信息位置和原始文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read aliases from a parsed frontmatter object.
ast.target: 从已解析的 frontmatter 对象中读取别名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read tags from a parsed frontmatter object.
ast.target: 从已解析的 frontmatter 对象中读取标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a string array field from a parsed frontmatter object.
ast.target: 从已解析的 frontmatter 对象中读取字符串数组字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a field from a parsed frontmatter object.
ast.target: 从已解析的 frontmatter 对象中读取字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new text file. Existing paths are rejected.
ast.target: 创建新的文本文件。如果路径已存在则拒绝操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new binary file from base64 content. Existing paths are rejected.
ast.target: 从 base64 内容创建新的二进制文件。如果路径已存在则拒绝操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new folder. Existing paths are rejected.
ast.target: 创建新文件夹。如果路径已存在则拒绝操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Copy a vault file or folder to a new path. Existing targets are rejected.
ast.target: 将保险库文件或文件夹复制到新路径。如果目标已存在则拒绝操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trash a vault file or folder respecting the users "trash" settings.
ast.target: 根据用户的“回收站”设置，将保险库文件或文件夹移至回收站。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace the full text content of an existing vault file.
ast.target: 替换现有保险库文件的全部文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace the full binary content of an existing vault file from base64 text.
ast.target: 从 base64 文本替换现有保险库文件的全部二进制内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append text content to an existing vault file.
ast.target: 向现有保险库文件追加文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append binary content to an existing vault file from base64 text.
ast.target: 从 base64 文本向现有保险库文件追加二进制内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace a Markdown file frontmatter block with a JSON object.
ast.target: 用 JSON 对象替换 Markdown 文件的 frontmatter 块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read cached text content from a vault file.
ast.target: 从保险库文件中读取缓存的文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read fresh text content from disk for a vault file.
ast.target: 从磁盘读取保险库文件的最新文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read binary vault file content as base64 text.
ast.target: 将保险库二进制文件内容读取为 base64 文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List vault files and folders, optionally under a folder path.
ast.target: 列出保险库文件和文件夹，可选择指定文件夹路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read metadata for a vault file or folder.
ast.target: 读取保险库文件或文件夹的元数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check whether a vault path exists.
ast.target: 检查保险库路径是否存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the currently active file, if any.
ast.target: 读取当前活动的文件（如果有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read Obsidian's recently opened file list.
ast.target: 读取 Obsidian 最近打开的文件列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read workspace leaves for a view type.
ast.target: 读取指定视图类型的工作区窗格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the JSON-safe workspace layout.
ast.target: 读取 JSON 安全的工作区布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read safe active view and editor state.
ast.target: 读取安全的活动视图和编辑器状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open an existing link target from a source path.
ast.target: 从源路径打开现有的链接目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open an existing file in a host-selected leaf.
ast.target: 在宿主选择的窗格中打开现有文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reveal an existing workspace leaf.
ast.target: 显示现有的工作区窗格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set an existing workspace leaf as active.
ast.target: 将现有的工作区窗格设为活动状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or retrieve a safe tab or split leaf.
ast.target: 创建或获取安全的标签页或分割窗格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Permission-gated Safe JS functions exposed through the RPC layer.
ast.target: 通过 RPC 层暴露的、受权限控制的安全 JS 函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Local worker console methods for debugging. Console output is not sent over the network by Safe JS.
ast.target: 用于调试的本地工作线程控制台方法。安全 JS 不会通过网络发送控制台输出。
